author: LinOnetwo
description: VSCode style opened files top bar
name: Opened Tiddlers Bar
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/AboveStory":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/AboveStory","tags":"$:/tags/AboveStory","text":"
<>
"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/changelog","caption":"Changelog","text":"! Changelog !! v1.2.0 (2026-04-28) * refactor: split `style.css.tid` into pure `style.css`+`style.css.meta` and `style.color.tid` for dynamic theme-dependent rules * fix: remove bottom border on bar that looked visually awkward !! v1.1.0 (2026-04-27) * fix [[#4|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/opened-tiddlers-bar/issues/4]]: Dark mode — bar background now follows TiddlyWiki theme color instead of hardcoded white * fix [[#6|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/opened-tiddlers-bar/issues/6]]: Sidebar toggle button obscured — `.tc-topbar-right` now positioned below bar height dynamically * fix [[#7|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/opened-tiddlers-bar/issues/7]]: Long tab titles now truncate with ellipsis; full title shown on hover tooltip * fix [[#9|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/opened-tiddlers-bar/issues/9]]: Bar is hidden on mobile viewports (≤768px) to save vertical space * fix [[#2|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/opened-tiddlers-bar/issues/2]]: Tabs are now draggable to reorder via TiddlyWiki `$draggable`/`$droppable` widgets * feat: add Playwright automated tests covering all fixed issues !! v1.0.0 * Initial release "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/config":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/config","tags":"$:/tags/ControlPanel/SettingsTab","caption":"<>","text":"\procedure lingo-base() $:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/ <> --- !! <> ;<> :<$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/configs/bar-height" tag="input" type="number" step="1" size="3" class="tc-tiddler-bar-height"/>px <>"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/configs/bar-height":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/configs/bar-height","text":"30"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Readme","text":"\procedure lingo-base() $:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/ ! <> <> !! Features Use the middle mouse button or the X button to close the tab. Use Shift + mouse wheel to swipe sideways to view. !! Credits This plugin is based on [[$:/plugins/bj/storytabs|http://bjtools.tiddlyspot.com/]] , which is in MIT license, thank you, Buggyj! "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Name":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Name","text":"Opened Tiddlers Bar"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Description":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Description","text":"Provides VSCode style "Opened Tiddlers" top bar"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/PluginConfigs":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/PluginConfigs","text":"Plugin Configs"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/ConfigDescription":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/ConfigDescription","text":"These settings let you customise the behaviour of Opened Tiddlers Bar plugin."},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Configs/BarHeight/Caption":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Configs/BarHeight/Caption","text":"Height of the bar"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Configs/BarHeight/Description":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/en-GB/Configs/BarHeight/Description","text":"Make the bar taller or shorter. Recommend to set it around 30px."},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Readme","text":"\procedure lingo-base() $:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/ ! <> <> !! 功能 使用中键或 X 按钮关闭标签。 使用 Shift + 鼠标滚轮左右滑动查看。 !! 鸣谢 此插件基于 [[$:/plugins/bj/storytabs|http://bjtools.tiddlyspot.com/]] ，该插件采用 MIT 许可证，感谢 Buggyj！ "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Name":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Name","text":"「开启的条目」栏"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Description":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Description","text":"灵感来自 Notion 和 VSCode 的主题"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/PluginConfigs":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/PluginConfigs","text":"插件设置"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/ConfigDescription":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/ConfigDescription","text":"通过这些设置，您可以自定义「开启的条目栏」插件的行为。"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Configs/BarHeight/Caption":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Configs/BarHeight/Caption","text":"栏的高度"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Configs/BarHeight/Description":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/zh-Hans/Configs/BarHeight/Description","text":"使栏变高或变矮。建议将其设置在 30px 左右。"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/Readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/Readme","text":"\procedure lingo-base() $:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/language/ <> "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/style.color":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/style.color","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","text":"\rules except horizrule dash /** * 由于 Tiddlywiki 会把 base.tid 里的 -- 识别为分隔符，变为 - ，所以如果需要用变量，就用 \rules except horizrule dash */ /** 顶部标题栏高度变量，依赖配置 tiddler */ body.tc-body { --menubar-height: {{$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/configs/bar-height}}px; } /** bar 背景色跟随主题 */ section.story-backdrop > p > .opened-tiddlers-bar-container { background: <>; } /** draggable tab: 拖拽悬停时显示插入位置指示线 */ div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs span.tc-droppable.tc-dragover { border-left: 2px solid <>; } /** make it possible to drag the app using this bar in TidGi, when TidGi's titleBar is closed */ <% if [[$:/state/titleBarOpened]get[text]match[no]] %> div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs { width: 90vw; overflow-x: auto; white-space: nowrap; overflow: -moz-scrollbars-none; scrollbar-width: none; } div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } div.opened-tiddlers-bar-drag-area { width: 5vw; -webkit-app-region: drag; } /** move right a bit to avoid collision with close button on macOS when title bar hide */ <% if [[$:/state/sideBarOpened]get[text]match[no]] %> section.story-backdrop { width: 100vw; padding-left: 68px; } <% endif %> <% endif %> "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/style.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/style.css","text":"section.story-backdrop .opened-tiddlers-bar-container{position:fixed;top:0;z-index:1000;height:var(--menubar-height);width:100vw;left:0;overflow-x:auto;white-space:nowrap;overflow:-moz-scrollbars-none;scrollbar-width:none}.opened-tiddlers-bar{height:var(--menubar-height)}section.story-backdrop .opened-tiddlers-bar-container::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}section.story-backdrop div.opened-tiddlers-bar div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs{display:flex;flex-direction:row;justify-content:flex-start}section.story-backdrop>p>.opened-tiddlers-bar-container,section.story-backdrop>p>.opened-tiddlers-bar-container>div.tc-tab-buttons{width:100%;margin:0;display:flex;background:0 0}section.story-backdrop>p>.opened-tiddlers-bar-container{backdrop-filter:blur(3px)}div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs button.tc-tab{height:calc(100% - 2px);border-radius:0;margin:0;padding:5px 2px 5px 10px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;max-width:200px}div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs button.tc-tab span.opened-tiddlers-bar-tab-title{overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;flex:1;min-width:0}div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs button.opened-tiddlers-bar-close-button{border:none;border-radius:0;margin:0;padding:0 5px;opacity:0;background-color:transparent}div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs:hover button.opened-tiddlers-bar-close-button{opacity:1}div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs span.tc-eventcatcher{display:inline-block;height:100%}section.story-backdrop div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs button.tc-tab:nth-child(2){margin-left:-1em}div.opened-tiddlers-bar.tc-tab-buttons{padding:0;margin:0}div.opened-tiddlers-bar-tabs span.tc-droppable{display:inline-flex;height:100%}.tc-topbar-right{top:calc(var(--menubar-height) + 4px);z-index:999}@media (max-width:768px){section.story-backdrop .opened-tiddlers-bar-container{display:none}body.tc-body{--menubar-height:0px}}","type":"text/css","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/tree":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/tree","text":"<>"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/ui":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar/ui","tags":"$:/tags/Global","text":"\procedure on-opened-tiddlers-bar-item-middle-click() <$list filter="[match[middle]]"> <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-close-tiddler" $param=<>/> \end \procedure on-drop-tab(droppedTitle) <$action-listops $tiddler="$:/StoryList" $field="list" $subfilter="-[] +[insertbefore:list,]"/> \end \procedure opened-tiddlers-bar() \whitespace trim
<$list filter="[list[$:/StoryList]]" history="$:/HistoryList" variable="currentTab"> <$droppable actions=<> class="opened-tiddlers-bar-droppable"> <$draggable tiddler=<>> <$reveal type="match" state="$:/HistoryList!!current-tiddler" text=<>> <$eventcatcher $auxclick=<>> <$button to=<> tooltip=<> class="tc-tab-selected tc-tab"> <$view tiddler=<> field="name"> <$view tiddler=<> field="title" /> <$button message="tm-close-tiddler" param=<> class="tc-image-button opened-tiddlers-bar-close-button"> × <$reveal type="nomatch" state="$:/HistoryList!!current-tiddler" text=<>> <$eventcatcher $auxclick=<>> <$button to=<> tooltip=<> class="tc-tab" > <$view tiddler=<> field="name"> <$view tiddler=<> field="title" /> <$button message="tm-close-tiddler" param=<> class="tc-image-button opened-tiddlers-bar-close-button"> ×
\end "}}}
title: $:/plugins/linonetwo/opened-tiddlers-bar
